comments.text: PersistencePhase uses :erlang.term_to_binary for encoding system key values (epoch, tags, timestamps, config values). RoutingData uses :erlang.binary_to_term for decoding. This should use tuple encoding for simple values (integers, timestamps) and FlatBuffers for compound values. Affects ~20 keys in PersistencePhase and 2 decode sites in RoutingData.
comments.author: Jason Allum

title: Replace term_to_binary with proper encoding for system keys
